subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved of God! Praise thou the Lord that thou art cherished in the Egypt of divine love and art honoured in the city of mystic knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز الهی حمد کن خدا را که در مصر محبت الهی عزیزی و در شهرستان عرفان و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
